observation.images.base_0_rgb.comment: Primary/exterior camera slot. float32 [0,1] CHW; the agent maps the env's exterior_image here and resizes to 224.

observation.images.left_wrist_0_rgb.comment: Wrist camera slot; the env's wrist_image maps here.

observation.images.right_wrist_0_rgb.comment: Second wrist slot (DROID has two wrist cams); the single-arm RoboLab env has no match, so the agent zero-fills it.

observation.text.comment: Task instruction (language conditioning); required by the VLA.

observation.state.comment: DROID joint-space proprio: active dims 0-6 = 7 Panda arm joint positions (rad), dim 7 = gripper opening; dims 8-31 are zero padding (model max_state_dim=32). QUANTILE-normalized. This is JOINT proprio — it matches the RoboLab DROID env's joint state (the agent zero-pads the env's 8-dim state to 32).

action.arm_joint_vel.comment: 7 Panda arm joint VELOCITY targets (the DROID action space; verified empirically — the arm dims are small velocities, not absolute joint positions). The model emits 32-dim actions; dims 0-6 are these, dims 8-31 are padding. Pairs with the env's joint_vel branch (JointVelocityActionCfg).

action.gripper.comment: Absolute gripper command in [0,1] (action dim 7); the agent clips to NORM01 and the env's binary gripper closes when >0.5.

comment: Official openpi DROID pi0.5, checkpoint lerobot/pi05_droid (loads as lerobot PI05Policy). Inputs: 3 cameras (base + 2 wrist; the single-arm RoboLab env fills base<-exterior, left_wrist<-wrist, right_wrist zero-padded) + 32-dim padded JOINT proprio (active 8: 7 joint pos + gripper). Output: 32-dim action, active 8 = 7 arm joint VELOCITIES + absolute gripper. chunk_size 15, ~15 Hz, QUANTILE normalization. Pairs with the env's joint_vel branch (launch env_server with --control joint_vel; see envs/droid_joint_vel.json). NB: this checkpoint's processor pipeline uses the pre-0.5.x step name 'relative_actions_processor' — the agent registers a compat alias at import. Unlike a LIBERO-trained pi0.5, the proprio here is joint-space, so it matches the env's joint state.
